# redis_set (Resource)

Manages a Redis set (`SADD`). On update, members removed from the configuration are deleted with `SREM`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "redis_set" "example" {
  key     = "article:1:tags"
  members = ["terraform", "redis", "infrastructure"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The Redis key.
- `members` (Set of String) The set of string members to store.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The Redis key, used as the resource identifier.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import redis_set.example "article:1:tags"
```
